creator: meta@vmeta.jp
text:
Lenovo USB 2.0 Ethernet Adapter [1] does not work with FreeBSD now.
This product is already supported by NetBSD. Is it possible to import 
it from NetBSD?

[1] http://shop.lenovo.com/SEUILibrary/controller/e/web/LenovoPortal/en_US/catalog.workflow:item.detail?GroupID=460&Code=0A36322

Fix: 

http://gnats.netbsd.org/cgi-bin/query-pr-single.pl?number=47245
How-To-Repeat: Here's the usbconfig result of this product.

# usbconfig
ugen0.2: <product 0x7203 vendor 0x17ef> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON (200mA)
